steps.title: Find weekly savings
steps.content:
Maria saves $$\frac{3}{7}$$ of $$224$$ dollars each week.
$$\frac{3}{7}\cdot 224=3\cdot 32=96$$

steps.title: Multiply by the weeks
steps.content:
At $96$ dollars per week for $8$ weeks, multiply to find the total saved.
$$96\cdot 8=768$$
The answer is 768.
